reports.exportNoData: No report data to export for {{year}}.
reports.noReports: No reports found for this year.

compareAgencies.title: Agency Energy Comparison
compareAgencies.subtitle: Compare energy consumption between two agencies in the same region.
compareAgencies.noDominantCause: No dominant cause detected for the selected period.
compareAgencies.noInsights: No insights available for this comparison.

causeMessages.AC usage: The higher-consuming agency used AC in ON mode more frequently, increasing cooling demand.
causeMessages.Client traffic: The higher-consuming agency had more client traffic, increasing cooling, lighting, and equipment usage.
causeMessages.Temperature: The higher-consuming agency recorded higher temperatures, causing stronger or more frequent AC operation.
causeMessages.Energy efficiency: The higher-consuming agency used more energy per client, suggesting lower operational efficiency.
causeMessages.After-hours usage: The higher-consuming agency used more energy outside business hours, which may indicate unnecessary equipment or AC operation after closing.
causeMessages.Peak load: The higher-consuming agency had stronger short-term load peaks.
causeMessages.Overall load: The energy difference appears to come from several small combined operational factors.
causeMessages.Energy balance: Both agencies have very similar total energy consumption for the selected period.

recommendationText.acSchedule: Review AC scheduling during business hours and avoid unnecessary ON mode usage.
recommendationText.afterHours: Check whether AC, lighting, or office equipment remains ON after closing.
recommendationText.insulation: Inspect insulation, sun exposure, and cooling efficiency for the higher-consuming agency.
recommendationText.efficiency: Monitor energy per client ratio over the next month and compare operating procedures.
recommendationText.traffic: Adjust cooling schedules to match peak client traffic periods instead of running at full load all day.
recommendationText.peakLoad: Investigate peak-load hours and stagger high-consumption equipment when possible.
recommendationText.policies: Compare equipment usage policies between agencies and document operational differences.
recommendationText.generateData: Generate or select a period with sensor readings before comparing agencies.
recommendationText.monitor: Continue monitoring energy per client and AC usage to detect future deviations.

footer.description: BH Bank, your financial partner for tailored solutions and quality service. Toward new perspectives.
